home.tagline: Send files from device to device — private, direct, no accounts.
home.sendHint: Pick a file and share the one-time code with the receiver.
home.receiveHint: Enter the code the sender gave you.

send.title: Sending
send.waitingForReceiver: Share this code with the receiver:

receive.title: Receiving
receive.acceptQuestion: Do you want to receive this file?

transfer.direct: Direct connection to the other device

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.pickFailed: Could not read the selected file.
errors.invalidCode: That does not look like a valid code. Codes look like: 7-word-word
errors.wrongCode: No file is being offered under this code. Double-check the code and make sure the sender's app is still open and waiting.
errors.network: Network problem — check your internet connection and try again.
errors.peerGone: The other side went away before the transfer finished.
errors.declinedBySender: The transfer was declined or cancelled by the other side.
